name: monadcode
description: Lightweight PowerShell script scheduler with web UI

scripts.build:exe: pkg . --target node18-win-x64 --output dist/monadcode.exe && node -e "fs=require('fs');fs.copyFileSync('node_modules/node-windows/bin/winsw/winsw.exe','dist/winsw.exe');fs.copyFileSync('node_modules/node-windows/bin/winsw/winsw.exe.config','dist/winsw.exe.config')" && echo winsw.exe copied to dist/
